text:
INCIDENT REPORT #011
Facility: Plant 1 - Tulsa
Asset: Generator GEN-3
Severity: LOW

DESCRIPTION
On the shift of record, operators observed an unexpected trip on high bearing temperature
on the Generator GEN-3. The unit was taken offline for inspection. Estimated downtime: 5.8 hours.

ROOT CAUSE
Root cause was determined to be bearing wear beyond tolerance.

CORRECTIVE ACTION
Replacement parts ordered and repair scheduled.
